title: Lugus-
description:
Official Ludus-SMP modpack
- This modpack is dedicated to a server i have made for me and my friends.
body:
Modded Smp
- On this server, mods were chosen accurately for the purpose of entertainment by adding non-overwhelming mods and new mechanics to the game that can add new possibilities .



A Variety of new landscapes :

-  With the assistance of many mods, we can discover new landscapes with new biomes and new dimensions in addition to the three basic vanilla dimensions that add a new taste to adventure.


Biome o'plenty
-  Adds a'plenty of biomes to discover, new types of building blocks, and pleasant visuals.


Aether
- One of the two new dimensions, with new enjoyable features. 


New game mechanincs :

 - In addition to your usual gameplay, you will be able to discover new mind-breaking mechanics that can add a dozen new possibilities to your game with most of them beeing vanilla friendly.

-  For the purpose of discovery, I won’t say more.

to sum up : fun to play with your firends if bored :)
feel free to download and use it at your will, the modpack is Vanilla friendly ! :D
